list.name: Changes
list.comment:
enhancing profile management and tracker UI
- Expanded `UserProfile` data class and `ProfileViewModel` to include age and weight fields. - Implemented automatic age calculation from date of birth and vice versa in `ProfileViewModel`. - optimize `SugarTrackerScreen` with a new dropdown for meal relations and gradient-styled action buttons. - Updated `WeeklyAnalyticsScreen` UI, replacing standard buttons with custom gradient components. - Refactored `SugarCareTextField` in `SharedComponents` to support custom colors and keyboard types. - Integrated age and weight validation and Firestore persistence in `ProfileViewModel` and `ProfileRepoImpl`. - Standardized navigation by renaming `BottomNavBar` to `SugarCareBottomNavBar` and removing the

task.summary:
implementing "Remember Me" functionality
- Added `AuthDataStore` using DataStore to persist user email and "Remember Me" preference. - Updated `AuthViewModel` to handle loading, saving, and clearing login details. - Integrated `AuthDataStore` logic into `signIn` and `signInWithGoogle` methods. - Modified `checkAuthStatus` to enforce sign-out if the "Remember Me" preference is disabled. - Updated `SugarCareNavHost` and `MainActivity` to inject `AuthViewModel` with the required context. - Added a logout action to the `CompleteProfileScreen` via `AuthViewModel`.

implementing profile management and Facebook authentication
- Integrated Facebook Login using `CallbackManager` and `LoginManager` in `AuthViewModel`. - Created `ProfileViewModel` and `ProfileRepo` to manage user profile data via Firestore. - Replaced `CompleteProfileScreen` with a `ProfileScreen` data validation and social provider initialization. - Added `UserProfile` data class and `ProfileUiState` to handle profile management states. - Implemented `ProfilePicture` component to handle dynamic profile images from Google, Facebook, and local placeholders. - Added `vibrate` utility and integrated haptic feedback for validation errors in profile fields. - Refactored `HomeScreen` to display the user's profile picture. - Updated `SugarCareNavHost` and `MainActivity` to support `ProfileViewModel` and Facebook activity results. - Enhanced UI components with gradient brushes and improved styling in `SharedComponents.kt` and `Theme.kt`. - Deleted `AuthManager.kt` and `AuthResponse.kt` in favor of `AuthViewModel` logic. - Added necessary permissions and metadata for Facebook SDK and vibration to `AndroidManifest.xml`.

enhancing profile management and tracker UI
- Expanded `UserProfile` data class and `ProfileViewModel` to include age and weight fields. - Implemented automatic age calculation from date of birth and vice versa in `ProfileViewModel`. - optimize `SugarTrackerScreen` with a new dropdown for meal relations and gradient-styled action buttons. - Updated `WeeklyAnalyticsScreen` UI, replacing standard buttons with custom gradient components. - Refactored `SugarCareTextField` in `SharedComponents` to support custom colors and keyboard types. - Integrated age and weight validation and Firestore persistence in `ProfileViewModel` and `ProfileRepoImpl`. - Standardized navigation by renaming `BottomNavBar` to `SugarCareBottomNavBar` and removing the

enhancing profile management and tracker UI
- Expanded `UserProfile` data class and `ProfileViewModel` to include age and weight fields. - Implemented automatic age calculation from date of birth and vice versa in `ProfileViewModel`. - optimize `SugarTrackerScreen` with a new dropdown for meal relations and gradient-styled action buttons. - Updated `WeeklyAnalyticsScreen` UI, replacing standard buttons with custom gradient components. - Refactored `SugarCareTextField` in `SharedComponents` to support custom colors and keyboard types. - Integrated age and weight validation and Firestore persistence in `ProfileViewModel` and `ProfileRepoImpl`. - Standardized navigation by renaming `BottomNavBar` to `SugarCareBottomNavBar` and removing the

enhancing profile management and tracker UI
- Expanded `UserProfile` data class and `ProfileViewModel` to include age and weight fields. - Implemented automatic age calculation from date of birth and vice versa in `ProfileViewModel`. - optimize `SugarTrackerScreen` with a new dropdown for meal relations and gradient-styled action buttons. - Updated `WeeklyAnalyticsScreen` UI, replacing standard buttons with custom gradient components. - Refactored `SugarCareTextField` in `SharedComponents` to support custom colors and keyboard types. - Integrated age and weight validation and Firestore persistence in `ProfileViewModel` and `ProfileRepoImpl`. - Standardized navigation by renaming `BottomNavBar` to `SugarCareBottomNavBar` and removing the

enhancing profile management and tracker UI
- Expanded `UserProfile` data class and `ProfileViewModel` to include age and weight fields. - Implemented automatic age calculation from date of birth and vice versa in `ProfileViewModel`. - optimize `SugarTrackerScreen` with a new dropdown for meal relations and gradient-styled action buttons. - Updated `WeeklyAnalyticsScreen` UI, replacing standard buttons with custom gradient components. - Refactored `SugarCareTextField` in `SharedComponents` to support custom colors and keyboard types. - Integrated age and weight validation and Firestore persistence in `ProfileViewModel` and `ProfileRepoImpl`. - Standardized navigation by renaming `BottomNavBar` to `SugarCareBottomNavBar` and removing the

enhancing profile management and tracker UI
- Expanded `UserProfile` data class and `ProfileViewModel` to include age and weight fields. - Implemented automatic age calculation from date of birth and vice versa in `ProfileViewModel`. - optimize `SugarTrackerScreen` with a new dropdown for meal relations and gradient-styled action buttons. - Updated `WeeklyAnalyticsScreen` UI, replacing standard buttons with custom gradient components. - Refactored `SugarCareTextField` in `SharedComponents` to support custom colors and keyboard types. - Integrated age and weight validation and Firestore persistence in `ProfileViewModel` and `ProfileRepoImpl`. - Standardized navigation by renaming `BottomNavBar` to `SugarCareBottomNavBar` and removing the

MESSAGE.value:
implementing "Remember Me" functionality
- Added `AuthDataStore` using DataStore to persist user email and "Remember Me" preference. - Updated `AuthViewModel` to handle loading, saving, and clearing login details. - Integrated `AuthDataStore` logic into `signIn` and `signInWithGoogle` methods. - Modified `checkAuthStatus` to enforce sign-out if the "Remember Me" preference is disabled. - Updated `SugarCareNavHost` and `MainActivity` to inject `AuthViewModel` with the required context. - Added a logout action to the `CompleteProfileScreen` via `AuthViewModel`.

implementing profile management and Facebook authentication
- Integrated Facebook Login using `CallbackManager` and `LoginManager` in `AuthViewModel`. - Created `ProfileViewModel` and `ProfileRepo` to manage user profile data via Firestore. - Replaced `CompleteProfileScreen` with a `ProfileScreen` data validation and social provider initialization. - Added `UserProfile` data class and `ProfileUiState` to handle profile management states. - Implemented `ProfilePicture` component to handle dynamic profile images from Google, Facebook, and local placeholders. - Added `vibrate` utility and integrated haptic feedback for validation errors in profile fields. - Refactored `HomeScreen` to display the user's profile picture. - Updated `SugarCareNavHost` and `MainActivity` to support `ProfileViewModel` and Facebook activity results. - Enhanced UI components with gradient brushes and improved styling in `SharedComponents.kt` and `Theme.kt`. - Deleted `AuthManager.kt` and `AuthResponse.kt` in favor of `AuthViewModel` logic. - Added necessary permissions and metadata for Facebook SDK and vibration to `AndroidManifest.xml`.

enhancing profile management and tracker UI
- Expanded `UserProfile` data class and `ProfileViewModel` to include age and weight fields. - Implemented automatic age calculation from date of birth and vice versa in `ProfileViewModel`. - optimize `SugarTrackerScreen` with a new dropdown for meal relations and gradient-styled action buttons. - Updated `WeeklyAnalyticsScreen` UI, replacing standard buttons with custom gradient components. - Refactored `SugarCareTextField` in `SharedComponents` to support custom colors and keyboard types. - Integrated age and weight validation and Firestore persistence in `ProfileViewModel` and `ProfileRepoImpl`. - Standardized navigation by renaming `BottomNavBar` to `SugarCareBottomNavBar` and removing the

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
enhancing profile management and tracker UI
- Expanded `UserProfile` data class and `ProfileViewModel` to include age and weight fields. - Implemented automatic age calculation from date of birth and vice versa in `ProfileViewModel`. - optimize `SugarTrackerScreen` with a new dropdown for meal relations and gradient-styled action buttons. - Updated `WeeklyAnalyticsScreen` UI, replacing standard buttons with custom gradient components. - Refactored `SugarCareTextField` in `SharedComponents` to support custom colors and keyboard types. - Integrated age and weight validation and Firestore persistence in `ProfileViewModel` and `ProfileRepoImpl`. - Standardized navigation by renaming `BottomNavBar` to `SugarCareBottomNavBar` and removing the
